content.en:
"Does the Remnant Heaven Pavilion have a different golden sand formula?"

Ye Tian asked.

"This question is a secret!" Fengyin Great Ancestor said, "However, even if there is a different golden sand formula, it is impossible to sell it." Even ordinary formulas are not allowed, let alone the Isojinsha formula. In addition, there is no such thing as a mutilated formula, because no force will study a mutilated formula. "

Ye Tian nodded, the different golden sand is so rare, it is impossible to use it to study the incomplete formula.

Afterwards, Ye Tian talked to Fengyin Great Ancestor and found that the Remnant Heaven Pavilion would not even sell the Isojinsha formula materials, unless he took out a large amount of Isojinsha Trading, the Remnant Heaven Pavilion would give him a small amount of formula materials.

But Ye Tian naturally wouldn't do this, unless he was stupid!

If it is really sold to the Remnant Heaven Pavilion a large amount of different golden sands, then how to explain the origin of the different golden sands?

When the time comes, the Remnant Heaven Pavilion will inevitably attack him, or follow him.

Moreover, even if a large amount of Isosand was actually sold, there would be no way to scrape together enough materials to complete more than nine reforgs of life by himself.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

......

"In the next few years, if I don't leave the Hurricane Capital, I exposed the Yijinsha this time, even if the Fengyin Great Ancestor will not make any moves, but after the news is leaked, it doesn't mean that other Great Ancestors will not spy on me!"

Ye Tian thought so, and stayed in the hurricane capital.

Anyway, he now has a large amount of Heterogeneous Silver Sand in his hands, which can be fused into a massive Heterogeneous Sands, and then perfect to create a Heterogeneous Sands formula on the basis of the Silver Dragon formula.

In this way, he would be able to refine the Isojinsha formula material on his own.

He's already had experience anyway, it's just a matter of taking some more time.

So, in the following years, Ye Tian took the time to create the formula of the Isojinsha Formula.

Since he didn't know the formula of Yijinsha, and he didn't have any incomplete formula to refer to, he could only create according to the Yinlong formula.

In the blink of an eye, a period of time has passed.

"There are really high-level immeasurable lifeforms to spy on me!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

Perhaps that high-level immeasurable lifeform thought that it was deeply hidden, but it still couldn't hide his copying talent.

Obviously, his sale of the Golden Sands has been exposed.

However, he didn't panic at all, even if he was really in danger, or if he was targeted by a big force, he would stay in the hurricane capital all the time.

He has other replica bodies that do not affect his movements.

......

Onidu Mountain.

The Wind Silver Great Ancestor of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion was meeting a high-level immeasurable lifeform, this was the Great Ancestor from the headquarters.

"Ape Leopard Ancestor, you are actually here!"

Fengyin Great Ancestor smiled.

"Let's take a look, after all, you have actually purchased some different golden sands here, although the quantity is scarce, but you can save some use, and you can still get a few materials. It is impossible for the major forces to sell the different golden sands, but now there is a great ancestor for sale, and the above is naturally curious. Have you heard about the origin of that Great Ancestor?"

The Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard asked.

"I heard it, it's from a hopeless place!" Fengyin Great Ancestor said, "However, it doesn't seem good for us to do this!"

"What's wrong?" the Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard sneered, "If he really discovers a different golden sand origin, then it is possible to find more different golden sands, or maybe he has more than that different golden sand on him!"

"Anyway, I'm not involved in this matter!"

Fengyin Great Ancestor said.

"Don't worry, I'll leave this matter to me!" said the Ape Leopard Ancestor with a wave of his hand.

However, no matter how powerful the Remnant Heaven Pavilion was, it was impossible to make a move in the Hurricane Capital, so the Ape and Leopard Great Ancestor stayed in the Hurricane Capital.

Even if it were a little more time waiting, it would be worth it.

......

In the blink of an eye, it was the first year of the Ten Thousand Worlds.

With the help of countless resources, as well as the resources found in the Voidless Galaxy, Ye Tian's cultivation gradually approached the limit of the mid-level immeasurable life form.

this day.

Ye Tian felt the prying eyes again.

"That high-level immeasurable lifeform hasn't even left yet!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Obviously, the other party has set their sights on him and has been staying in the hurricane capital.

However, his current strength is not the opponent of a high-level immeasurable lifeform, so if he leaves the Hurricane Capital and this replica body is killed, the identity of the Xuanming Great Ancestor who has worked hard will have to be abandoned.

So, he still couldn't leave.

"When I do a few more life reforges, even if I can't defeat that high-level immeasurable lifeform, I will have the confidence to protect myself!" Ye Tian muttered.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation could no longer advance an inch, reaching the limit of a middle-level immeasurable life form.

Next, it's time to reforge your life.

At this time, he also successfully created the Yijinsha formula, which was created on the basis of the silver dragon formula, which he called the golden dragon formula.

The material refined from this golden dragon formula was called Golden Dragon Stone by him, and the effect of reforging life was about seven or eight times that of Silver Dragon Gold.

For an ordinary Great Ancestor, it was undoubtedly too wasteful to use the Golden Dragon Stone to reforge the life level.

But the life level of the Golden Dragon Stone Reforged is very stable, even after nine reforges, it can continue to be reforged without causing the body to collapse.

The benefits and potential it brings are not visible at the moment, but they can be seen when the cultivation is high.

"I don't know if my golden dragon stone formula is good or not, but it's definitely not bad, after all, I use a lot of different golden sands for this kind of formula, and those big forces are reluctant to use so many different golden sands as formula materials!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Start cultivating!"

Ye Tian took out a piece of golden dragon stone, immediately absorbed it into his body, and began to use it to refine the life level, so as to reforge it.

To complete the first recast, it is certainly not enough to rely on one material, according to previous experiments, at least ten materials are needed.

Rumble!!!!

The golden dragon stone melted, enveloping Ye Tian's whole body, and began to reforge his life in a special way.

Ye Tian only felt that his body had collapsed and healed again and again, and he was recasting his life in a very violent way.

And in this case, his Infinite Body seems to be improving.

You must know that after the Infinite Body reaches the Xiaocheng realm, it is difficult to improve, but I didn't expect that it can be improved when the life is reforged, but the improvement is very small, and it is difficult to reach the Dacheng realm.

After a long time, this piece of golden dragon stone was consumed, which was equivalent to the loss of a material.

Immediately, Ye Tian prepared another golden dragon stone to continue to reforge the life level.
